title: ZR Project
description: Project manifest for zr_vm. Relative paths are resolved from the directory containing the .zrp file.

manifestVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Version 1 enables assembly identity and alias-based references.

assembly.description: Assembly identity written into metadata and AssemblyRef records. When present, assembly.name/version override legacy top-level name/version for assembly identity.

name.description: Stable assembly identity name, such as zr.math.

culture.description: Optional assembly culture. Defaults to neutral.

kind.description: Optional assembly kind. Defaults to library.

output.description: Optional .zrm assembly output path. Relative paths are resolved from the project manifest directory. Defaults to binary/<assembly-name>.zrm.

license.description: License identifier or free-form license name.

binary.description: Directory used for compiled binary artifacts such as .zro/.zri outputs.

entry.description: Entry module path relative to the source root, without the .zr extension.

pathAliases.description: Optional import alias map. Keys start with @ and values are canonical module prefixes relative to the source root.

dependencies.description: Optional third-party zrp dependency map. Keys start with $ and values are dependency manifest paths or objects with path/version metadata.

oneOf.description: Dependency .zrp path relative to this manifest.

path.description: Dependency .zrp path relative to this manifest.

version.description: Expected dependency version. If the dependency manifest also declares version, it must match.

minVersionInclusive.description: Minimum accepted dependency version for emitted AssemblyRef metadata.

maxVersionExclusive.description: Exclusive maximum accepted dependency version for emitted AssemblyRef metadata.

references.description: Alias-based assembly references. Keys are source import aliases used as &alias imports; each entry names the real assembly identity and references either a .zrp project manifest or a .zrm assembly container.

assembly.description: Expected referenced assembly name from the target manifest.

path.description: Referenced .zrp manifest or .zrm assembly path relative to this manifest.

version.description: Expected referenced assembly version. If omitted, the target assembly version is used.

minVersionInclusive.description: Minimum accepted assembly version for emitted AssemblyRef metadata.

maxVersionExclusive.description: Exclusive maximum accepted assembly version for emitted AssemblyRef metadata.

resources.description: Logical resources to include in an emitted .zrm assembly. Keys are safe logical names under resources/ inside the container.

oneOf.description: Resource file path relative to this manifest. Stored under the key's logical name and compressed by default.

path.description: Resource file path relative to this manifest.

compress.description: Whether to deflate this resource in the .zrm container. Defaults to true.

hash.description: Optional caller-provided resource content hash recorded in the .zrm manifest.

dependency.description: Optional dependency root or manifest path used by the project loader.

local.description: Optional local package root or workspace-relative override path.
